info.title: Tags
info.description: vNext REST API for Public Blog services
info.x-hubspot-api-use-case: Retrieve all blog tags as a part of a content audit, then update specific tags to support an upcoming company rebrand.
info.x-hubspot-introduction: Use the blog tags API to create and manage available blog post tags for easy sorting and filtering on your site.

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: The paging cursor token of the last successfully read resource will be returned as the `paging.next.after` JSON property of a paged response containing more results.

get.description: Get the list of blog tags. Supports paging and filtering. This method would be useful for an integration that examined these models and used an external service to suggest edits.

parameters.description: The maximum number of results to display per page.

post.description: Attach a Blog Tag to a multi-language group.
Create a new language variation from an existing Blog Tag

post.summary: Detach a Blog Tag from a multi-language group
post.description: Detach a Blog Tag from a multi-language group.

put.description: Set a Blog Tag as the primary language of a multi-language group.

post.description: Explicitly set new languages for each Blog Tag in a multi-language group.

get.description: Retrieve the Blog Tag object identified by the id in the path.

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Whether to return only results that have been archived.

delete.description: Delete the Blog Tag object identified by the id in the path.

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Whether to return only results that have been archived.

patch.description:
Sparse updates a single Blog Tag object identified by the id in the path.
All the column values need not be specified. Only the that need to be modified can be specified.

parameters.name: archived
parameters.description: Whether to return only results that have been archived.

languages.description: Map of object IDs to associated languages of object in the multi-language group.

primaryId.description: ID of the primary object in the multi-language group.

id.description: ID of object to set as primary in multi-language group.
ID of the object to remove from a multi-language group.

correlationId.description: A unique identifier for the request. Include this value with any error reports or support tickets

links.description: A map of link names to associated URIs containing documentation about the error or recommended remediation steps

message.description: A human readable message describing the error along with remediation steps where appropriate

subCategory.description: A specific category that contains more specific detail about the error

example.message: Invalid input (details will vary based on the error)

id.description: ID of the object to add to a multi-language group.

language.description: Designated language of the object to add to a multi-language group.

primaryId.description: ID of primary language object in multi-language group.

primaryLanguage.description: Primary language of the multi-language group.

code.description: The status code associated with the error detail

in.description: The name of the field or parameter in which the error was found.

message.description: A human readable message describing the error along with remediation steps where appropriate

subCategory.description: A specific category that contains more specific detail about the error

id.description: ID of the object to be cloned.

name.description: Name of newly cloned blog tag.

primaryLanguage.description: Language of primary blog tag to clone.

created.description: The timestamp (ISO8601 format) when this Blog Tag was created.

deletedAt.description: The timestamp (ISO8601 format) when this Blog Tag was deleted.

id.description: The unique ID of the Blog Tag.

language.description: The explicitly defined ISO 639 language code of the tag.

translatedFromId.description: ID of the primary tag this object was translated from.

updated.description: The timestamp (ISO8601 format) when this Blog Tag was updated.

after.description: A paging cursor token for retrieving subsequent pages.

link.description: A URL that can be used to retrieve the next page results.

NextPage.description: Specifies the paging information needed to retrieve the next set of results in a paginated API response
